{"society_power": 7.5, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Fourth Republic instability, colonial defeats, then 1958 Gaullist restoration", "reasoning": "The Fourth Republic combined a growing administrative/dirigiste apparatus with chronically fragile political cohesion\u2014colonial defeats (Dien Bien Phu, Suez, Algeria) and the 1958 near-coup depressed state power despite the year-end Gaullist rebuilding, netting a modest decline; meanwhile Trente Glorieuses prosperity, strong unions, and populist mobilization (Poujadists) marginally strengthened an already dense civil society."}
